curation_notes: The patch modifies only conn.go (1 non-test source file). The fix introduces a setReadRemaining helper that validates the readRemaining value is non-negative before assignment, preventing integer overflow when casting uint64 wire values to int64. The primary vulnerable location is the advanceFrame function where frame payload lengths (especially the 64-bit case) are read as uint64 and cast directly to int64 without overflow checks. An additional overflow check was added for readLength accumulation. The pre-assigned class integer-overflow is correct: CWE-190 (Integer Overflow) directly matches the vulnerability mechanism.
